title: RSH Stakeholder Survey 2024-2025
body: "This page includes an analysis of the results from the RSH stakeholder survey for 2024-2025. The survey seeks views from stakeholders such as registered providers of social housing and other sector representatives about a range of issues.  We use the results to inform:   our performance monitoring continuous development of our operational approach our corporate planning   "

taxons.title: Housing for older and vulnerable people
